title: Traditional Chinese Translation Patch by KuriPaPa (580+ Mods) 繁體
description: A comprehensive Traditional Chinese translation patch for 580+ mods in Minecraft 1.21.1. 收錄超過 580 個模組的 1.21.1 繁體中文翻譯整合包，自用分享。
body:
This is a Traditional Chinese (ZH-TW) language resource pack specifically developed for the **Minecraft 1.21.1** modded environment. ヾ(\*´∀ ˋ\*)ﾉ

It contains translations for over **580+ mods**, covering English-to-Chinese translations, Simplified-to-Traditional fixes, and terminology unification. (,,・ω・,,)

*   **Original Intent:** Created primarily for personal use. I’m sharing this in the spirit of the community—I translate as I play! ヽ(✿ﾟ▽ﾟ)ノ
*   **Quality Disclaimer:** Due to the massive number of mods, some content may include machine translation drafts, awkward phrasing, or missing lines. **100% accuracy is NOT guaranteed.** It’s meant for reference/completion, or simply to "make do" with what's there. \_(:3 」∠ )\_
*   **How to Use:** Place the file into your `resourcepacks` folder and move it to the **very top** of your resource pack list in-game. (ﾟ∀。)

**\[Compatibility\]**

*   **Logic:** Even though this is built for 1.21.1, as long as the mod authors keep using the same language keys, this pack should work across various versions. (\*´ω\`)人(´ω\`\*)
*   **Ignore the Warning:** If Minecraft warns you about "Version Incompatibility," feel free to ignore it and load the pack anyway. It usually works perfectly! (ﾟ∀。)

***

這是專為 Minecraft 1.21.1 環境開發的繁體中文語言包。ヾ(\*´∀ ˋ\*)ﾉ

內含超過 **580 個模組** 的翻譯內容，包含部分英翻中、簡轉繁修正以及用語統一(,,・ω・,,)

*   **開發初衷：** 主要是為了自用而製作，本著分享精神上傳，玩到哪翻到哪ヽ(✿ﾟ▽ﾟ)ノ
*   **品質聲明：** 由於模組數量龐大，部分內容可能包含機器翻譯初稿、語法不流暢或漏翻。**不保證 100% 精準**，僅供參考與補全，或純粹湊合著用\_(:3 」∠ )\_
*   **使用方式：** 下載後放入 `resourcepacks` 資料夾，並在遊戲中將其移至材質包清單的**最頂端** (ﾟ∀。)

**\[相容性說明\]**

*   **相容邏輯：** 雖然這是專為 1.21.1 製作，但只要模組作者持續使用同一套語言鍵（Language Keys），通常都可以無視版本差異直接套用。(\*´ω\`)人(´ω\`\*)
*   **無視警告：** 若遊戲提示版本不相容，通常直接按「是」無視即可正常顯示翻譯內容。(ﾟ∀。)
